airbnb.name: Design System Inspired by Airbnb
airbnb.description: Travel marketplace. Warm coral accent, photography-driven, rounded UI.

apple.name: Design System Inspired by Apple
apple.description: Consumer electronics. Premium white space, SF Pro, cinematic imagery.

stripe.name: Design System Inspired by Stripe
stripe.description: Payment infrastructure. Signature purple gradients, weight-300 elegance.

notion.name: Design System Inspired by Notion
notion.description: All-in-one workspace. Warm minimalism, serif headings, soft surfaces.

vercel.name: Design System Inspired by Vercel
vercel.description: Frontend deployment. Black and white precision, Geist font.

github.name: Design System Inspired by GitHub
github.description: Code-forward platform. Functional density, blue-on-white precision, Primer foundations.

cursor.name: Design System Inspired by Cursor
cursor.description: AI-first code editor. Sleek dark interface, gradient accents.

figma.name: Design System Inspired by Figma
figma.description: Collaborative design tool. Vibrant multi-color, playful yet professional.

minimal.name: Design System Inspired by Minimal
minimal.description: Stripped-back design emphasizing whitespace, clean typography, and restrained color for maximum clarity and focus.

corporate.name: Design System Inspired by Corporate
corporate.description: Professional, brand-aligned design with structured grids, minimalist layouts, and consistent enterprise patterns.

editorial.name: Design System Inspired by Editorial
editorial.description: Magazine-inspired editorial layout with refined serif typography, structured grids, and elegant reading experiences.

bold.name: Design System Inspired by Bold
bold.description: Strong visual presence with heavyweight typography, high-contrast colors, and commanding layouts.

brutalism.name: Design System Inspired by Brutalism
brutalism.description: Raw, anti-design aesthetic inspired by concrete architecture with unadorned elements, jarring layouts, and functional minimalism.

material.name: Design System Inspired by Material
material.description: Google's Material Design with layered surfaces, dynamic theming, built-in motion, and responsive cross-platform patterns.

modern.name: Design System Inspired by Modern
modern.description: Contemporary editorial style with serif typography, minimal palettes, and clean layouts for polished digital products.
